Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and active promotions, keeping messaging accurate and relevant without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete marketing email including subject line, body copy, and calls-to-action based on the scraped product and promotional data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, on-brand email content daily in seconds, eliminating hours of copywriting effort per campaign.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the AI-generated marketing email to segmented R1 Concepts contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers daily targeted emails to the full contact base automatically, driving consistent customer engagement and repeat purchases.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product pages, featured parts, and current promotions to inform email content.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email campaigns grounded in real product data, reducing errors and ensuring promotional accuracy without manual input.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Writes a full DFC-branded marketing email with subject line, body, and calls-to-action tailored to the friction parts audience.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Scales daily email production with zero copywriting overhead, maintaining brand consistency across every send.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Distributes the AI-generated email to DFC contact lists through the HubSpot Marketing Email API on a daily schedule.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures DFC customers receive consistent, timely outreach that drives traffic and sales without requiring manual campaign setup.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, ticket metadata, and contact history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Gives the AI full ticket context instantly, enabling accurate classification and relevant replies without agents manually retrieving information.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies the ticket by issue type and drafts a complete, contextually appropriate reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket response drafting time dramatically, allowing support agents to handle higher volume with faster first-response times.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the classification label and draft reply back to the HubSpot ticket so support agents can review, edit, and send from their existing workflow.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the entire support workflow inside HubSpot, reducing tool-switching and making AI assistance seamlessly adoptable by the team.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form stored in HubSpot, including customer details and issue descriptions.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Centralizes raw customer issue data from a distributed Amazon campaign into one structured pull, eliminating manual data collection.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved form submissions into a structured Google Sheet, appending new records and organizing by issue category and date.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a live, sortable view of product return trends and customer complaints, enabling faster quality and operations decisions.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity logs to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces buying intent signals in real time, allowing the sales team to reach out while interest is highest rather than discovering it days later.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends a real-time alert to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams message and email containing the contact's details and activity summary.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Enables immediate follow-up on warm prospects, increasing conversion likelihood and reducing the window competitors have to engage the same customer.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Planned customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts — specific integrations and workflow steps are not yet defined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to improve customer self-service and response times once deployed, reducing inbound support load.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories, listings, and commercial real estate signals to identify businesses in the Cerritos area likely needing warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Generates a fresh list of qualified local prospects daily without requiring any manual research, keeping the outreach pipeline continuously filled.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates decision-maker email addresses for each identified business using email discovery tools.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures outreach lands with the right person, improving reply rates and avoiding wasted sends to generic inboxes.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Creates contact records in HubSpot and sends personalized warm intro emails about the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates the full top-of-funnel outreach cycle daily, generating subletting leads passively while tracking opens and replies in HubSpot.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversion metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Aggregates multi-account ad data automatically, eliminating hours of manual reporting and giving the AI complete performance context.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data to identify underperforming ads, budget inefficiencies, and optimization opportunities across both brands.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Surfaces actionable insights and recommended bid or budget adjustments that would take a human analyst hours to manually identify.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / DuckDuckGo API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube, Instagram, and the web using target keywords to surface relevant content creators and their public profile data.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Replaces hours of manual creator research by returning a broad pool of relevant candidates across platforms in one automated pass.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Reviews discovered creator profiles and content to assess relevance, audience fit, and alignment with target brand or campaign criteria.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters a large raw discovery pool down to genuinely relevant creators, saving the team from manually reviewing hundreds of unqualified profiles.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche relevance, audience size, and content quality.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective creator shortlist in seconds, allowing marketing teams to prioritize outreach without subjective manual scoring.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the qualified creator list and previously learned outreach sequences and prompt templates stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach campaign starts from vetted creator data and proven messaging frameworks, eliminating manual file hunting and reducing setup time per campaign.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each creator by applying learned sequences and prompts to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Delivers tailored, high-quality outreach at scale without copywriting effort, increasing reply rates by maintaining a personal tone across hundreds of contacts.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated personalized outreach emails directly to each qualified creator's inbox.
Creator Outreach.impact: Executes outreach to large creator pools instantly, freeing partnership teams from manual sending and ensuring consistent follow-up cadence.

Creator Reponse.action: Loads historical influencer email conversations and negotiation playbooks to train contextual response behavior.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real past negotiations, preserving institutional knowledge and replicating successful deal-closing patterns automatically.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator reply emails and surfaces the conversation thread context for AI processing.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps the agent aware of each creator's latest message and tone, enabling contextually accurate responses without human review of every thread.

Creator Reponse.action: Generates a negotiation-aware reply by combining the incoming message, thread history, and learned deal patterns from past influencer contacts.
Creator Reponse.impact: Accelerates creator deal closure by responding intelligently within minutes, maintaining negotiation momentum while reducing manual back-and-forth from partnership managers.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads the MHM vehicle data and New Availability Guide, then matches part numbers to generate the weekly load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual spreadsheet cross-referencing each Monday, producing an accurate load sheet in seconds and removing human matching errors.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and populates a HubSpot email draft with the generated sales sheet and load sheet attached, then sends it to the target audience.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Ensures the Must Have Monday email goes out consistently every week with accurate inventory data, protecting revenue opportunities tied to timely dealer communication.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a confirmation message to the relevant Teams channel once the email has been successfully created and sent.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Gives the marketing team instant visibility into campaign execution without logging into HubSpot, reducing oversight effort and confirming no missed sends.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product data as input.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces ready-to-use launch email drafts in seconds, enabling the team to go to market faster on new products without waiting on copywriting resources.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates formatted email drafts in HubSpot with AI-generated copy and attaches the relevant sales sheets for review and sending.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Keeps all First to Market communications organized inside HubSpot with zero manual draft creation, ensuring consistent formatting and audit-ready campaign records.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Captures CRM performance data automatically, replacing manual HubSpot report exports that previously took significant analyst time each month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click-through rates, and subscriber counts for the month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates SMS reporting data automatically, ensuring SMS metrics are never omitted from the deck due to manual process gaps.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches web traffic, session data, conversion rates, and channel attribution metrics for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers accurate web analytics into the deck without manual GA4 export and copy-paste, removing a common source of reporting errors.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics from HubSpot, Attentive, GA4, and Search Console directly into slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Completes eight slides of the monthly deck automatically, saving hours of manual data entry and ensuring every number is pulled from source without transcription errors.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms versus competitors by analyzing current rankings and search impression data.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Targets only high-opportunity keywords with existing search demand, ensuring every blog produced has a clear path to organic traffic growth.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Produces fully written, SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps with proper structure, headers, and metadata.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Generates publication-ready blog content at scale, allowing R1 Concepts to close keyword gaps faster than manual content production allows.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including focus keyword, meta description, and slug.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Eliminates manual upload and SEO configuration steps, ensuring every article goes live fully optimized and indexed-ready without editor intervention.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports outstanding vendor purchase order data including order dates, expected delivery windows, and vendor contact details.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Captures the full open PO picture automatically, removing the need for Shirly or the team to manually pull and format ERP reports before follow-up can begin.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Uploads and maps the transformed PO data into HubSpot contact and deal records, then triggers vendor chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Converts raw ERP data into actionable HubSpot workflows that automatically chase vendors on overdue POs, saving hours of manual email drafting and follow-up tracking per week.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number input and matches each entry against the embedded New Availability Guide data within the browser tool.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Gives any team member the ability to generate an accurate load sheet instantly without needing ERP access, spreadsheet skills, or waiting on another department.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Formats the matched results into a structured DFC load sheet and exports it as a downloadable Excel file.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Produces a properly formatted, submission-ready load sheet in one click, eliminating manual Excel formatting and reducing errors in dealer order submissions.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Opens the Attentive dashboard via Chrome automation, locates the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clones it as the starting point for the new week.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Replicates the proven campaign structure every week without manual setup, saving the time required to recreate audience targeting, message format, and compliance settings from scratch.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's MHM vehicle name and adjusts the scheduled send time before saving the campaign.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Publishes a fully configured weekly SMS campaign in minutes instead of the 20–30 minutes of manual Attentive setup, ensuring on-time delivery every Monday.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, product categories, and revenue figures for analysis.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides the raw sales intelligence needed to power all downstream segmentation and campaign decisions, replacing manual data pulls with an automated feed.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into dashboards by behavior — active buyers, cross-sell candidates, reorder candidates, and lapsed accounts — then enrolls each group in targeted email sequences.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Turns raw sales data into automated revenue actions, triggering reorder reminders and win-back emails at the right moment without manual campaign planning.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS messages to lapsed or high-value customer segments identified from the Dream sales analysis for win-back and cross-sell campaigns.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Reaches customers on a high-conversion channel with timely, relevant offers, increasing the likelihood of reactivating lapsed accounts and growing average order value.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking and ensures the automation triggers only when fresh session data is available, saving prep time every Saturday.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a new public download URL to replace the previous week's link.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures subscribers always receive a link to the current week's session file without manual asset swapping or broken links.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps the download link with the new URL, and schedules the email to send at 8AM Saturday.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistently branded weekly email to subscribers on time with zero manual build effort, maintaining engagement with the DFC community.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized B2B blog content targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — using keyword and topic inputs.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready blog drafts at scale without writer overhead, accelerating DFC's organic search presence in competitive B2B segments.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog content and publishes or stages it as a new post with proper formatting, meta fields, and category tags.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Keeps DFC's blog consistently active with keyword-targeted content that drives organic traffic and generates qualified B2B leads over time.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday video formats, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia, and fetches vehicle specs and history from Wikipedia to build the raw content package.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research and asset gathering per video, giving the AI a rich, vehicle-specific context before a single word is written.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the scraped vehicle data and generates a complete, structured Friction Friday video script including intro, segment breakdowns, and outro in the established show format.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a publish-ready script in seconds that matches show tone and structure, removing the need for a human copywriter on every episode.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using the configured show voice.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers broadcast-quality narration instantly, removing the need to schedule or record a human voiceover for each video.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the completed asset package — script, voiceover file reference, thumbnail image, and assembled video metadata — and logs everything to the Friction Friday tracker sheet.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Creates a single organized record per vehicle episode so the team can track production status, access all assets in one place, and queue videos for upload without digging through files.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows and audits enrollment triggers, branch logic, and email sequences for site visit and welcome series flows.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Identifies redundant, broken, or underperforming workflow steps, giving R1 a clear optimization roadmap without hours of manual workflow review.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Applies recommended changes to workflow logic, timing delays, and contact segmentation criteria directly via the HubSpot API.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Improves lead nurture efficiency and welcome series conversion rates by ensuring the right contacts receive the right messages at the right time.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Exports DFC customer records including Dream CustomerIDs, contact details, and account data needed for HubSpot mapping.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Provides the authoritative customer identifier that links ERP purchase history to HubSpot contacts, enabling accurate sales automation targeting.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Matches Dream CustomerIDs to existing HubSpot contacts and writes the CustomerID as a custom property on each matched record.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Enables DFC's sales automation workflows to reference real ERP customer data, unlocking personalized outreach and purchase-behavior-based triggers.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in planning stage with connections and scope not yet defined.
Bomb File Project.impact: Early planning ensures the automation is scoped correctly before build, reducing rework and aligning stakeholders on expected outcomes.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects a newly published R1 Concepts YouTube video and extracts its title, URL, description, and transcript.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Triggers the full multi-channel distribution pipeline the moment R1 content goes live, ensuring no publishing delay across blog, email, or SMS.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Auto-generates and publishes an SEO blog post embedding the R1 video with supporting written content from the transcript.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Multiplies the value of each video by creating lasting searchable content that drives organic traffic to R1's site long after the video publishes.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Generates and sends a weekly branded email to R1's HubSpot subscriber list featuring the new video and blog post.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Keeps R1's customer base engaged with fresh weekly content, driving traffic back to owned channels and supporting retention and upsell goals.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Sends a concise SMS to R1's opted-in mobile subscribers linking directly to the week's new video or blog post.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Captures mobile-first customers who may miss email, boosting total content reach and reinforcing brand touchpoints across multiple channels.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and average position data for DFC blog URLs.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides direct evidence of SEO progress, showing which blog topics are gaining search visibility and driving qualified organic traffic to DFC.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves session, engagement, and conversion data for DFC blog traffic to measure business impact beyond rankings.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Connects SEO activity to real business outcomes like time-on-site and lead actions, proving the ROI of the blog automation program.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls post publish history, word counts, and Yoast SEO scores to report on content output volume and quality metrics.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Tracks agent efficiency by showing how many posts were published, at what quality level, and how output correlates with traffic growth.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword ranking trends, click data, and impression volume for R1 Concepts blog content.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Quantifies the SEO impact of the blog agent over time, showing month-over-month ranking gains and organic traffic growth for R1.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly traffic, session quality, and goal completion data attributed to R1 blog content.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Demonstrates the downstream business value of organic content by linking blog traffic to measurable on-site actions and conversions.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Reports on the number of blog posts published, scheduling consistency, and overall content output for the reporting period.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Gives stakeholders a clear view of agent productivity and publishing cadence, validating the automation's output against expected volume targets.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors Richard's Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDFs attached to emails and triggers the processing workflow.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Eliminates manual download-and-process steps, ensuring every qualifying invoice is captured and processed immediately upon arrival.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Processes each PDF using PDF tools to programmatically stamp the Harbor Tires company stamp and overlay Richard's signature at the correct document position.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Reduces invoice turnaround time from minutes to seconds per document, eliminating manual printing, signing, and scanning entirely.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Sends the completed stamped-and-signed PDF back to the appropriate recipient or saves it to a designated folder via Outlook.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Completes the full invoice approval loop automatically, ensuring vendors receive processed documents quickly and records are stored without manual filing.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are being visited and passes page-level visit data into the workflow trigger logic.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Ensures only high-intent prospects who visited specific product or category pages are entered into the workflow, improving email relevance and conversion rates.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Fires one of 6 Phase 1 workflow triggers based on the specific page visited and enrolls the contact into the matching automated email sequence.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Delivers contextually relevant follow-up emails automatically within minutes of a site visit, replacing manual outreach and capturing interest at peak intent.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives incoming customer support requests and captures the raw ticket content including issue description, order details, and customer identity.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Centralizes all inbound support volume into a single intake point, ensuring no tickets are missed and every request is logged for AI processing.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Classifies the ticket by issue type, determines urgency, and drafts a resolution response or routes it to the appropriate support tier.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Reduces average ticket handle time by automating classification and response drafting, allowing support agents to focus only on complex escalations.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Updates the ticket record with the AI classification, sends the drafted response to the customer, and flags escalations for human review.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Speeds up resolution times and ensures consistent, accurate responses across all support tickets without requiring manual agent intervention on routine issues.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the monthly new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and triggers the agent to begin the upload and distribution workflow.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Eliminates manual coordination steps by using an existing team communication channel as the launch point, reducing setup time for each monthly campaign.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Ingests the new arrivals file and updates the DFC product catalog with the latest part listings and associated details.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Keeps the product backend current without manual data entry, ensuring the email and SMS campaigns reference accurate, live inventory.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG email template, populates it with the new arrival product data, and queues it for monthly deployment to the subscriber list.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Saves hours of manual email building each month by automating template cloning and content population, ensuring brand-consistent campaigns go out on schedule.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG SMS template and sends a new arrival announcement text to the opted-in subscriber list aligned with the email deployment.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Extends campaign reach to SMS subscribers simultaneously with email, increasing new arrival visibility and driving higher traffic to the DFC site on launch day.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies and enrolls prospective shipping carriers as contacts, then sends templated RFQ outreach emails automatically.
Don Carrier Outreach.impact: Scales carrier prospecting without adding headcount, ensuring a consistent pipeline of new carrier candidates is contacted and tracked without manual effort.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Receives carrier responses with pricing and lead time data, then automatically scores each carrier against current carrier benchmarks using the 5% cost and lead time thresholds.
Don Carrier Outreach.impact: Instantly filters qualified carriers from non-competitive ones, allowing the logistics team to focus only on viable options and accelerating the vendor selection process.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the current week's performance metrics across all three paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Consolidates multi-platform data in seconds, eliminating the need to manually export reports from three separate ad platforms each week.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Compares current week metrics against the rolling prior-month average for each channel and generates a plain-English performance summary with notable changes flagged.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Transforms raw ad data into an actionable weekly snapshot that highlights what's improving or declining, saving analysts hours of manual benchmarking and interpretation.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Sends the formatted weekly performance checkup report to the relevant team members automatically every week.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Ensures the media team starts each week aligned on paid channel performance without scheduling a meeting or waiting for a manual report.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Extracts full-month performance data across all paid channels including spend, ROAS, conversion volume, CPM, and audience metrics.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Automates the most time-consuming part of monthly reporting by pulling structured data from all platforms simultaneously rather than channel by channel.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Formats the aggregated monthly data into slide-ready summaries, key takeaways, and month-over-month comparisons structured for the end-of-month presentation.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Cuts monthly report preparation time significantly by producing presentation-ready content that requires minimal editing before being added to slides.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Delivers the completed monthly report to stakeholders in a structured email formatted for easy copy-paste into the end-of-month slide deck.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Gets the monthly report into stakeholders' hands automatically, ensuring leadership reviews are never delayed by late manual report compilation.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty registration form and tags them with a qualifying audience segment property.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Creates a real-time, auto-updating list of high-intent Amazon buyers who have self-identified as customers, ready for retargeting without any manual list management.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Validates and normalizes the contact data to ensure it meets Meta's custom audience matching requirements before syncing.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Improves audience match rates on Meta by ensuring clean, properly formatted data is sent, maximizing the number of contacts successfully added to the ad audience.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Adds the validated customer records to the designated Meta custom audience, making them immediately targetable for paid social campaigns.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Enables retargeting of verified Amazon customers on Meta automatically, turning post-purchase warranty registrations into a high-value paid social audience with zero manual uploads.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Pulls active ad creative data including copy, headlines, CTAs, and performance metrics such as CTR, engagement rate, and conversion rate for all running ads.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Surfaces the full inventory of live ad copy alongside performance data in one pull, creating the foundation for an objective audit without manual platform navigation.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Identifies underperforming ads based on copy quality and metric benchmarks, then generates specific rewrite recommendations with reasoning for each flagged ad.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Delivers actionable, ad-specific copy improvements that would otherwise require hours of manual creative review, helping the team prioritize optimizations that directly impact ROAS.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Sends the audit results and copy recommendations to the paid social team in a structured email organized by platform and priority.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Puts copy recommendations directly in the team's inbox on a regular cadence, ensuring creative optimizations are reviewed and actioned without requiring a separate reporting workflow.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, status changes, overdue items, or newly created tasks across connected projects.
Asana Agent.impact: Keeps stakeholders informed of project health automatically, reducing the need for manual status check-ins and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

Asana Agent.action: Summarizes the Asana task activity into a concise, readable digest highlighting blockers, upcoming deadlines, and completed work.
Asana Agent.impact: Converts raw project data into a meaningful summary that gives team leads instant clarity on project status without logging into Asana.

Asana Agent.action: Delivers the Asana project digest to relevant team members or stakeholders via email on the configured schedule.
Asana Agent.impact: Ensures project visibility reaches the right people automatically, keeping distributed teams aligned without relying on everyone to proactively check Asana.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting where tasks, owners, and deadlines are discussed.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Ensures no action items from the meeting are lost or forgotten by immediately feeding the discussion content into the automation pipeline.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Routes the meeting notes or transcript to the Claude processing step via email as a structured handoff between the Teams capture and AI extraction.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Creates a reliable transfer point between the meeting communication layer and the AI model, ensuring content is delivered in a consistent format for processing.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Reads the meeting notes and extracts discrete tasks with associated owners, due dates, and priority levels structured for Asana entry.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Eliminates manual task creation after every meeting by automatically converting conversational meeting content into structured, Asana-ready task data.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Creates or updates tasks in the appropriate Asana project with the extracted details including assignee, deadline, and task description.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Makes weekly media meeting follow-through automatic, ensuring every discussed action item is tracked in Asana within minutes of the meeting ending rather than relying on manual entry.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls all active search ad copy along with performance metrics — CTR, conversion rate, impression share, and Quality Score — for ads flagged as underperforming.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Surfaces the exact ads dragging down campaign performance so the audit is focused and actionable rather than a manual review of every ad in the account.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Analyzes each underperforming ad's copy against performance data and generates specific rewrite recommendations with reasoning for each suggested change.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Replaces hours of manual copy review with structured, data-informed suggestions that a media buyer can act on immediately.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Sends a formatted audit report email containing the flagged ads, their performance metrics, and Claude's copy recommendations to the relevant team member.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act brief directly to the decision maker's inbox, cutting the gap between insight and execution to near zero.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the current state of the Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent names, statuses, owners, last updated dates, and any notes logged during the week.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Captures the full week's progress across all agents in one structured pull, making the update repeatable without anyone manually compiling a summary.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reformats the raw sheet data into a clean, readable weekly update with clear sections for completed agents, in-progress builds, and items needing attention.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Transforms a dense spreadsheet into a digestible leadership update in seconds, saving manual formatting time and ensuring nothing is buried or missed.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly Agent Tracker update to the designated recipients on a scheduled basis.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Keeps stakeholders consistently informed on automation progress without requiring anyone to manually write or send the update each week.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification — make, model, year, and relevant fitment details — via a HubSpot form, triggering the workflow.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Gives Mark a simple, repeatable submission interface that kicks off the entire catalog build automatically, no back-and-forth required.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the Dream system using the submitted vehicle specs to retrieve all matching DFC parts and identify gaps where no stocked part exists for that application.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly surfaces what DFC has and what it's missing for a given vehicle, replacing what would otherwise be a manual catalog cross-reference.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Structures the Dream inventory results into a clean, organized Excel-ready format and labels missing parts clearly so the output is immediately usable.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a polished, professional catalog file without manual formatting, making the output ready to share with a customer or internal team the moment it's generated.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the completed Excel catalog file to Mark with the vehicle spec confirmed in the subject line.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of his form submission, eliminating wait time for manual lookups.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantities, on-order dates, and in-transit details for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent lookups with a single automated pull, making the enriched report available in minutes instead of hours.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the backorder report, flags any parts with no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source as dead ends, and segments lines by urgency.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Produces one enriched, prioritized report that tells the team exactly where each order stands and which items need immediate escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backorder updates, using the enriched report data to populate accurate status details per customer order.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Removes the burden of individually written customer updates and ensures every affected customer gets a timely, accurate communication without manual effort.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment map automatically, capturing catalog data that would take days to compile manually.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitments against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify matches, gaps, and opportunity fitments.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly shows Dino which vehicles are already covered and which represent untapped product opportunities, without manual side-by-side comparison.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers to gather demand data for the identified gap fitments.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Turns a static gap analysis into live demand intelligence, letting DFC validate new product investments before committing to tooling.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles the full output — competitor fitments, DFC cross-reference, coverage gaps, and customer response data — into one formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single, always-current source of truth for two-piece rotor strategy, replacing scattered files and manual updates.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — across every live campaign and ad set.
Meta Investigation.impact: Gives the agent full visibility into what's currently running in seconds, eliminating the need to manually open and review individual ads across platforms.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every piece of pulled ad copy for the specified phrases or patterns and produces a flagged list with the exact ad, field name, and matched text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Surfaces every instance of a problematic phrase across all active ads in one pass, replacing what would otherwise be a tedious manual audit.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged list to the requester with each match organized by platform, campaign, and field so issues can be acted on immediately.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable audit report on demand, allowing the team to pull or correct non-compliant ads before they cause legal or policy issues.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts attached resumes and applicant details, and routes each submission into the workflow.
Resume Bot.impact: Captures every inbound application automatically so no candidate falls through the cracks during high-volume hiring periods.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to the designated Drive folder, organized by role and applicant name for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable resume archive without manual filing, ensuring all candidate documents are stored consistently and accessibly.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the relevant open role, produces a hire/deny/pause recommendation with reasoning, and drafts the appropriate auto-reply for denied or paused candidates.
Resume Bot.impact: Reduces recruiter screening time dramatically by delivering a scored, reasoned shortlist rather than a raw pile of resumes, while ensuring every applicant gets a timely response.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant decision — including score, recommendation, resume link, and status — to the hiring dashboard, with paused-role candidates automatically routed to a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a real-time, organized view of the full applicant pipeline without manual data entry, and ensures paused candidates are easy to revisit when roles reopen.

summary: The AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 56 total agents across the team — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the pipeline remains steady from last update. The 28 completed agents continue running across daily, weekly, and on-demand schedules, driving consistent value across email marketing, SEO, paid media, creator outreach, and more. With 10 agents actively in development and 18 more on the horizon, there's plenty of exciting momentum ahead as we work toward bringing more of the pipeline to completion!
